basic_details.job_title: IIT Dharwad Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D.
qualification.details: Post graduate in any social science discipline (55% minimum) with NET /M.Phil. / Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Dharwad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Dharwad Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant post at IIT Dharwad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Research Assistant position at IIT Dharwad is 21st June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant post in the IIT Dharwad Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in any social science discipline with a minimum of 55% marks, along with NET, M.Phil., or Ph.D.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Research Assistant position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening of applications followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The position of Research Assistant at IIT Dharwad is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Dharwad located?
faq.answer: IIT Dharwad is located in Dharwad, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Dharwad or the provided application link before the last date.
